system.effect: The character loses 1 Wound per Round at the start of their Turn, ignoring Armour and Toughness Bonus. This continues until the Bleeding is stopped.
system.removal: A successful Medicae test stops the Bleeding. The character may also attempt First Aid on themselves at a −10 penalty.

description.value: The character is losing blood from an open wound. Each Round at the start of their Turn, they lose 1 Wound, ignoring Armour and Toughness Bonus. Multiple instances of Bleeding stack, increasing the Wounds lost per Round. Bleeding can be stopped with a successful Medicae test.

system.notes: Multiple Bleeding conditions stack, each adding 1 additional Wound lost per Round.
